a:r.a:t: SUB AGENTS (shared platform agents, reused across UCs)
Synthetic monitoring-driven detection of critical customer journeys order flow, waitlist, reservation, menu browse, cart, checkout, payment reachability
Incident-triggered AI support ticket reading, key-detail extraction, faster triage for store/order/payment failures and customer-reported errors

Continuous monitoring of operational signals across Azure Monitor, App Insights, Akamai, SOA, CommerceTools, Contentstack, Google Analytics for order trend dips, customer feedback signals, error spikes
multi-source log mining (App Insights / Azure Monitor)
Service Desk Automation for L1 Support
L1 task automation, password reset, DOB update, CCPA requests, standard customer / account support actions
Below are a few high-value IntelliOps use cases that are commonly prioritized,
but the broader set is client-specific and can be extended based on business needs and operating model.
